summary: Comprehensive testing of ASSOCIATE Legal Platform MVP completed. Backend APIs mostly functional (75% success rate), frontend UI loads correctly with professional design. Authentication and navigation working properly.

timeout_endpoints.issue: AI query processing times out after 15 seconds
timeout_endpoints.impact: Users cannot get AI-powered legal assistance responses
Users cannot create or view library items

routing_issues.issue: Direct navigation to /app/assistant redirects to landing page
routing_issues.impact: Users must navigate through dashboard, cannot bookmark specific pages

working_components: Landing page with all sections (hero, features, use cases, workflows, CTA, footer)
Professional design with white background, black text as specified
Workflows page showing all 20 workflows organized by categories
Authentication flow redirects to Emergent Google Auth correctly
Responsive navigation and user interface elements

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all required sections
GET /api/auth/me with test session token returns user data
Dashboard layout loads with sidebar navigation
Workflows page shows 20 workflow cards with categories (litigation, taxation)
All navigation links in sidebar working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI assistant query timeout issue - likely Claude API integration needs optimization or error handling. Fix library endpoint timeouts. Consider adding loading states and better error handling for long-running AI operations. Fix routing to allow direct navigation to protected routes.
